name: ultimate-seo-geo
description: Full-site SEO audits with health scores, technical SEO, Schema.org structured data, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for AI search. 31 bundled diagnostic scripts; HTML/XLSX/PDF reports; parallel audit workers (agents/PARALLEL-AUDIT.md); optional MCP (Firecrawl, DataForSEO). Progressive disclosure: compact SKILL routing shell plus procedures in references/procedures/. LLM-agnostic.

plugins.name: ultimate-seo-geo
plugins.description: Scored SEO audits, technical health checks, Schema.org JSON-LD, E-E-A-T content scoring, backlink analysis, domain authority rating, and GEO for AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity. 31 bundled scripts. HTML, Excel, and optional PDF reports. Parallel audit scopes in agents/PARALLEL-AUDIT.md. Optional MCP (Firecrawl, DataForSEO) via references/optional-extensions-mcp.md. Modes: Audit → Plan → Execute.
